global_summary.cfg_half_note: L1 computed on cond half ([:B]) of residual (r_msa + r_mlp).

time_axis_note: per_block_step_error key 為字串化 step_idx（0=第一步 DDPM t=249，249=最後步 t=0）。對齊 Stage1 expanded_mask 約定。

cache_scheduler_runtime_overrides.note: Overrides are unions on top of Stage1-expanded recompute sets; they do not replace Stage1 scheduler JSON.

stage2_threshold_meta.note: Single global thresholds from CLI. Use build_blockwise_thresholds_dit.py + --threshold-config for per-block thresholds (Pass 2).
